case_title: PEREZ, JANICE VS ESTATE OF RAY HIILS C/O JOHN LAURICELLA MILLS TOWE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, JANICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF RAY HIILS C/O JOHN LAURICELLA MILLS TOWE NICOLAI, SOHI WEBBER, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF RAY HIILS C/O JOHN LAURICELLA MILLS TOWE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JANICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICOLAI, SOHI WEBBER, BILL $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00, THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFT. SOHI NICOLAI AND BILL WEBBER AS CO-EXECUTORS OF THE ESTATE OF RAY HILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLAI, SOHI
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WEBBER, BILL
